ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( IsConverted = TRUE, NOT( OR( INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "ROOFTILE"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "TILE"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "SANITARY"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "ADHESIVE"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "N.STONE"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "SURFACE"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "WOODTILE"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "GLSBRK"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "LIGHTS"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "OTHERS"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "FITTINGS"), INCLUDES(Check_List_Items__c, "PAINT") ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select at least one Checklist item before converting the Lead.
